sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: vine_swinging
special_mechanics.description: Mowgli can swing on vines to navigate platforms. Described by reviewers as central gameplay mechanic.

special_mechanics.name: projectile_combat
special_mechanics.description: Mowgli starts with banana projectile weapon. Boss characters can only be damaged by projectiles, not by jumping on them.

special_mechanics.name: bouncing
special_mechanics.description: Mowgli can bounce on enemies as part of navigation mechanic

special_mechanics.name: climbing
special_mechanics.description: Mowgli can climb vines and navigate vertical spaces

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Wikipedia source provides no quantitative physics parameters. Game described as side-scrolling platformer in 'similar mold of Pitfall!' with emphasis on animation, vine-swinging, projectile combat, and careful navigation. Controls described as good by reviewers but no frame-data or velocity values documented.
